title: Show HN: Robust LLM Extractor for Websites in TypeScript
content: GitHub - lightfeed/extractor: Using LLMs and AI browser automation to robustly extract web data · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert lightfeed / extractor Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 8 Star 192 main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 52 Commits 52 Commits .github/ workflows .github/ workflows src src test-data @ 69637d0 test-data @ 69637d0 tests tests .env.example .env.example .gitignore .gitignore .gitmodules .gitmodules .npmignore .npmignore CHANGELOG.md CHANGELOG.md CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md jest.config.js jest.config.js package-lock.json package-lock.json package.json package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.json View all files Repository files navigation Lightfeed Extractor Robust Web Data Extractor Using LLMs and Browser Automation Overview Lightfeed Extractor is a Typescript library built for robust web data extraction using LLMs and Playwright. Use natural language prompts to navigate web pages and extract structured data. Get complete, accurate results with great token efficiency — critical for production data pipelines. Features 🤖 Browser Automation in Stealth Mode - Launch Playwright browsers locally, in serverless clouds, or connect to a remote browser server. Avoid detection with built-in anti-bot patches and proxy configuration for reliable web scraping. 🧭 AI Browser Navigation - Pair with @lightfeed/browser-agent to navigate pages using natural language commands before extracting structured data. 🧹 LLM-ready Markdown - Convert HTML to LLM-ready markdown, with options to extract only main content and clean URLs by removing tracking parameters. ⚡️ LLM Extraction - Use LLMs in JSON mode to extract structured data according to input Zod schema. Token usage limit and tracking included. 🛠️ JSON Recovery - Sanitize and recover failed JSON output. This makes complex schema extraction much more robust, especially with deeply nested objects and arrays. 🔗 URL Validation - Handle relative URLs, remove invalid ones, and repair markdown-escaped links. Tip Building retail competitor intelligence at scale? Go to app.lightfeed.ai - our full platform for tracking competitor pricing, sales, promotions, and SEO across 1,000+ retail chains - get started for free. For generic web data pipelines with AI enrichment and workflow automation, check out lightfeed.ai . Installation Install the extractor: npm install @lightfeed/extractor Then install the LLM provider you want to use: # OpenAI npm install @langchain/openai # Google Gemini npm install @langchain/google-genai # Anthropic npm install @langchain/anthropic # Ollama (local models) npm i
title_zh: Show HN：基于 TypeScript 的网站稳健 LLM 提取器
summary_zh: Lightfeed Extractor 是一个基于 TypeScript 开发的库，旨在利用大型语言模型（LLM）和浏览器自动化技术，实现稳健的网页数据提取。该项目通过自然语言指令导航网页并提取结构化数据，注重令牌使用效率，适用于生产级数据管道。，核心功能包括：利用 Playwright 进行隐蔽模式的浏览器自动化，支持本地、无服务器云环境或远程浏览器服务器连接，并通过内置的反检测补丁和代理配置提升抓取可靠性。该库可与 @lightfeed/browser-agent 配合，使用自然语言命令导航页面后再提取数据。它还能将 HTML 转换为适合 LLM 处理的 Markdown 格式，提供提取主要内容、清理URL跟踪参数等选项。在数据提取环节，支持通过 JSON 模式调用 LLM（如 OpenAI、Google Gemini、Anthropic Claude 或本地 Ollama 模型），并依据输入的 Zod 模式输出结构化数据，同时包含令牌使用限制与追踪功能。此外，工具提供了 JSON 输出修复机制，能对提取失败的 JSON 进行清理和恢复，增强了处理复杂嵌套对象和数组时的鲁棒性，以及 URL 验证功能，可处理相对路径、移除无效链接并修复 Markdown 转义后的链接。，该库适用于需要大规模、自动化网页数据提取的场景，例如零售竞争情报分析。其设计重点在于通过 AI 增强工作流，确保数据提取的完整性和准确性。

title: Show HN: Optio – Orchestrate AI coding agents in K8s to go from ticket to PR
content: GitHub - jonwiggins/optio: Workflow orchestration for AI coding agents, from task to merged PR. · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Dismiss alert jonwiggins / optio Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 8 Star 186 main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 155 Commits 155 Commits .github .github .husky .husky apps apps docs/ screenshots docs/ screenshots helm/ optio helm/ optio images images k8s k8s packages packages scripts scripts .dockerignore .dockerignore .editorconfig .editorconfig .env.example .env.example .gitignore .gitignore .optio-run-token .optio-run-token .prettierignore .prettierignore .prettierrc .prettierrc CHANGELOG.md CHANGELOG.md CLAUDE.md CLAUDE.md CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md Dockerfile.agent Dockerfile.agent Dockerfile.api Dockerfile.api Dockerfile.web Dockerfile.web LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md SECURITY.md SECURITY.md commitlint.config.js commitlint.config.js docker-compose.yml docker-compose.yml eslint.config.js eslint.config.js package.json package.json pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.base.json turbo.json turbo.json View all files Repository files navigation Optio Workflow orchestration for AI coding agents, from task to merged PR. Optio turns coding tasks into merged pull requests — without human babysitting. Submit a task (manually, from a GitHub Issue, or from Linear), and Optio handles the rest: provisions an isolated environment, runs an AI agent, opens a PR, monitors CI, triggers code review, auto-fixes failures, and merges when everything passes. The feedback loop is what makes it different. When CI fails, the agent is automatically resumed with the failure context. When a reviewer requests changes, the agent picks up the review comments and pushes a fix. When everything passes, the PR is squash-merged and the issue is closed. You describe the work; Optio drives it to completion. Dashboard — real-time overview of running agents, pod status, costs, and recent activity Task detail — live-streamed agent output with pipeline progress, PR tracking, and cost breakdown How It Works You create a task Optio runs the agent Optio closes the loop ───────────────── ────────────────────── ────────────────────── GitHub Issue Provision repo pod CI fails? Manual task ──→ Create git worktree ──→ → Resume agent with failure context Linear ticket Run Claude Code / Codex Review requests changes? Open a PR → Resume agent with feedback CI passes + approved? → Squash-merge + close issue Intake — tasks come from the web UI, GitHub Issues (one-click assign), or Linear tickets Provisioning — Optio finds or creates
title_zh: Show HN：Optio——在K8s中编排AI编码代理，实现从工单到PR的自动化流程
summary_zh: Optio 是一个用于在 Kubernetes 中编排 AI 编程代理的工作流协调系统，旨在实现从开发任务到合并 Pull Request 的自动化流程。该项目将编码任务转化为已合并的 PR，无需人工持续干预。，用户可以通过手动提交、GitHub Issue 或 Linear 工单创建任务，Optio 随后自动处理后续环节：它首先提供一个隔离环境，运行 AI 代理（如 Claude Code/Codex），创建 PR，监控 CI 状态，触发代码审查，自动修复失败项，并在所有检查通过后自动合并代码。，Optio 的核心特点在于其闭环反馈机制。当 CI 失败时，系统会携带失败上下文自动恢复代理运行；当审查者请求修改时，代理能获取评审意见并推送修复；一旦所有条件满足，PR 会被压缩合并，相关 issue 也将关闭。该平台还提供仪表板，用于实时查看运行中的代理状态、Pod 状态、成本及近期活动。，其工作流程分为三个阶段：任务创建（接收来自 Web UI、GitHub Issue 或 Linear 的输入）、代理执行（在临时仓库 Pod 中运行 AI 代理并开启 PR），以及闭环处理（根据 CI 结果或评审反馈自动迭代，直至成功合并）。这使得开发者只需描述工作内容，Optio 即可驱动其完成至交付。

title: Show HN: A plain-text cognitive architecture for Claude Code
content: Cog — Cognitive Architecture for Claude Code
title_zh: Show HN：面向Claude Code的纯文本认知架构
summary_zh: Cog是一个为Claude Code设计的纯文本认知架构项目，旨在通过结构化的思维框架提升AI在代码生成与理解任务中的表现。该项目基于认知科学原理，构建了一套系统化的提示工程方法，引导Claude等大型语言模型（LLM）更有效地进行复杂编程推理。，核心架构采用模块化设计，将编程认知过程分解为多个阶段，包括问题解析、方案规划、代码实现、测试验证和迭代优化。每个阶段通过特定的文本模板和指令集来引导模型，使其思维过程更加透明、可控。该架构强调“思维链”的显式化，要求模型逐步输出中间推理步骤，从而提升代码生成的准确性和可解释性。，技术细节上，Cog并非一个软件库或API，而是一套方法论和最佳实践集合。它通过精心设计的纯文本提示（prompt）来运作，这些提示定义了任务上下文、约束条件以及期望的推理格式。项目提倡将复杂的编程任务拆解为一系列子目标，并利用Claude模型的指令跟随能力，按顺序处理这些子目标。这种方法有助于减少模型在单次生成中可能出现的逻辑跳跃或错误。，该架构的主要特点在于其简洁性和通用性。它不依赖于特定的外部工具或复杂的集成，仅通过文本交互即可实现，降低了使用门槛。同时，它提供了应对不同编程场景（如调试、重构、算法设计）的适应性框架。其价值在于为开发者提供了一种系统化、可重复的方法来利用Claude Code的高级能力，有望在代码生成质量、任务完成率以及人机协作效率方面带来显著提升。项目已在GitHub等平台开源，鼓励社区贡献和案例实践。

title_zh: 与Claude相关的输出中90%流向GitHub评分低于2星的项目库
summary_zh: 根据对Claude Code使用数据的观察，一个显著的趋势是：高达90%与Claude相关的代码输出流向了GitHub上星级低于2星（即关注度较低）的代码仓库。这揭示了Claude Code目前主要被用于大量新兴或小众的个人及实验性项目。，数据显示，Claude Code的采用保持增长，周环比增长8%，但增速有所放缓。其用户基数翻倍时间约为61天。自公开推出以来，可验证的最早公开提交记录出现在2025年2月24日，一个名为“ClashOfCans”的游戏项目修改了初始设置，以确保玩家始终从一个正确的罐头位置开始游戏。，在最近一周，首次观察到Claude Code提交的全新（非复刻）仓库数量达到114,785个。代码净增量（新增行数减去删除行数）高达+307亿行。全球总提交次数超过2080万次，其中新增代码行数约504亿行，被删除（重构）的代码行数约197亿行。目前有超过108万个活跃项目在使用Claude Code。，从编程语言分布来看，TypeScript以34.8%的提交占比（约725万次提交）位居第一，其次是Python（18.9%，约392万次提交）和JavaScript（10.2%，约213万次提交）。实时系统活动日志显示，Claude Code正被广泛用于各种任务，包括文档更新、身份验证功能（如魔法链接登录）、服务器端行级安全策略（RLS）实现、项目数据统计图表添加，以及协议桥接和自适应重试阈值等复杂系统调试。，这些数据表明，Claude Code作为AI编程助手，其产出主要沉淀在大量低星级仓库中，正成为驱动个人开发者、实验性项目和小型团队快速原型开发与代码迭代的重要工具，尤其在TypeScript和Python生态中活跃度最高。

title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill - AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

This skill keeps you current. /last30days researches your topic across Reddit, X, Bluesky, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, and the web from the last 30 days, finds what the community is actually upvoting, sharing, betting on, and saying on camera, and writes you a grounded narrative with real citations. Whether it's Seedance 2.0 access, paper.design prompts, or the latest Nano Banana Pro techniques, you'll know what people who are paying attention already know. New in v2.9.5 — Bluesky, Comparative Mode, and Config Improvements: Bluesky/AT Protocol is now a social source. Opt-in via BSKY_HANDLE + BSKY_APP_PASSWORD (create at bsky.app/settings/app-passwords). Full pipeline: search, score, dedupe, render. Comparative mode - ask "X vs Y" (e.g., /last30 cursor vs windsurf ) and get 3 parallel research passes with a side-by-side comparison: strengths, weaknesses, head-to-head table, and a data-driven verdict. Per-project .env config - drop a .claude/last30days.env in your project root for per-project API keys. SessionStart config check - validates your config automatically when a Claude Code session starts. Expanded test coverage - 455+ tests across all modules. New in v2.9.1 — Auto-save to ~/Documents/Last30Days/: Every run now saves the complete briefing as a topic-named .md file to your Documents folder. Build a personal research library automatically. Inspired by @devin_explores . New in v2.9 — ScrapeCreators Reddit + Top C
title_zh: mvanhorn/last30days-skill - 一款AI智能体技能，可研究Reddit、X、YouTube、HN、Polymarket及全网任意主题，并生成基于事实的综合摘要
summary_zh: GitHub项目mvanhorn/last30days-skill是一个AI agent技能，旨在帮助用户追踪过去30天内任何话题的最新动态。该技能能够跨多个平台进行综合研究，包括Reddit、X（原Twitter）、Bluesky、YouTube、TikTok、Instagram、Hacker News、Polymarket以及更广泛的网络内容。其核心功能是分析社区在这些平台上的实际行为——例如点赞、分享、投注和视频讨论——并基于真实引用，生成一份扎实的、叙事性的摘要报告。这使得用户能够快速了解诸如“Seedance 2.0访问权限”、“paper.design提示词”或“最新Nano Banana Pro技术”等前沿话题的社区共识与趋势。，项目最新版本v2.9.5引入了多项重要更新。首先，新增了对Bluesky/AT Protocol社交平台的支持，用户可通过配置BSKY_HANDLE和BSKY_APP_PASSWORD来启用该数据源。其次，新增了“比较模式”，用户可以输入“X vs Y”格式的查询（例如“/last30 cursor vs windsurf”）。在此模式下，系统会并行执行三次独立研究，最终生成一份并排对比报告，内容包括各自的优势劣势、直接对比表格以及基于数据的结论。此外，该版本支持基于项目的环境配置，允许在项目根目录放置.claude/last30days.env文件来管理专属API密钥，并在Claude Code会话启动时自动验证配置。测试覆盖范围也大幅扩展，目前所有模块共有超过455个测试。，此前版本v2.9.1引入了自动保存功能，每次运行生成的完整简报都会以主题命名的.md文件形式自动保存到用户“~/Documents/Last30Days/”目录下，帮助用户自动构建个人研究资料库。该技能可通过Claude的插件市场直接添加安装，其设计目标是应对AI领域日新月异的变化，确保用户能及时掌握关注者群体已知的最新信息。

Team Mode (Recommended) Starting in v4.1.7 , Team is the canonical orchestration surface in OMC. The legacy swarm keyword/skill has been removed; use t
title_zh: Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode - 面向团队的Claude Code多智能体编排平台
summary_zh: GitHub项目oh-my-claudecode是一个专为Claude Code设计的、以团队优先的多智能体编排框架。该项目旨在简化Claude Code的使用，用户无需学习其具体操作，通过OMC即可获得流畅的编排体验。其核心特点是提供了零学习曲线的多智能体协作环境。，项目提供了快速入门指南：首先通过插件市场安装oh-my-claudecode，然后运行设置命令，之后即可开始构建应用，例如通过“autopilot”指令自动构建一个用于管理任务的REST API。整个过程高度自动化。，对于需求不明确的用户，项目提供了“深度访谈”功能。通过使用苏格拉底式提问，该功能能在编写代码前帮助用户厘清思路，揭示隐藏假设，并在多个加权维度上评估想法的清晰度，从而确保在开始执行前明确构建目标。，从v4.1.7版本开始，项目正式确立了“团队模式”作为标准的编排界面。原有的“swarm”相关关键词和技能已被移除，用户现在应使用“团队”模式进行多智能体协作。该模式旨在模拟一个团队协作环境，让不同的AI智能体扮演特定角色并协同工作，以更高效、更结构化地完成复杂任务。，该项目在GitHub上获得了高度关注，拥有超过1.2万个星标，表明了开发者社区对其价值的认可。它通过提供直观的命令和自动化工作流，降低了使用Claude Code进行多智能体应用开发的门槛，特别适合团队协作的开发场景。

title: virattt/dexter - An autonomous agent for deep financial research
content: GitHub - virattt/dexter: An autonomous agent for deep financial research · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert virattt / dexter Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 2.3k Star 18.7k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 399 Commits 399 Commits .github/ workflows .github/ workflows scripts scripts src src .gitignore .gitignore AGENTS.md AGENTS.md README.md README.md SOUL.md SOUL.md bun.lock bun.lock env.example env.example jest.config.js jest.config.js package-lock.json package-lock.json package.json package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.json View all files Repository files navigation Dexter 🤖 Dexter is an autonomous financial research agent that thinks, plans, and learns as it works. It performs analysis using task planning, self-reflection, and real-time market data. Think Claude Code, but built specifically for financial research. Table of Contents 👋 Overview ✅ Prerequisites 💻 How to Install 🚀 How to Run 📊 How to Evaluate 🐛 How to Debug 📱 How to Use with WhatsApp 🤝 How to Contribute 📄 License 👋 Overview Dexter takes complex financial questions and turns them into clear, step-by-step research plans. It runs those tasks using live market data, checks its own work, and refines the results until it has a confident, data-backed answer. Key Capabilities: Intelligent Task Planning : Automatically decomposes complex queries into structured research steps Autonomous Execution : Selects and executes the right tools to gather financial data Self-Validation : Checks its own work and iterates until tasks are complete Real-Time Financial Data : Access to income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements Safety Features : Built-in loop detection and step limits to prevent runaway execution ✅ Prerequisites Bun runtime (v1.0 or higher) OpenAI API key (get here ) Financial Datasets API key (get here ) Exa API key (get here ) - optional, for web search Installing Bun If you don't have Bun installed, you can install it using curl: macOS/Linux: curl -fsSL https://bun.com/install | bash Windows: powershell -c " irm bun.sh/install.ps1|iex " After installation, restart your terminal and verify Bun is installed: bun --version 💻 How to Install Clone the repository: git clone https://github.com/virattt/dexter.git cd dexter Install dependencies with Bun: bun install Set up your environment variables: # Copy the example environment file cp env.example .env # Edit .env and add your API keys (if using cloud providers) # OPENAI_API_KEY=your-openai-api-key # ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=your-anthropic-api-key (optional) # GOOGLE_API_KEY=your-google-api-key (optional) # XAI_API_KEY=your-xai-api-key (optional) #
title_zh: Virattt/Dexter - 深度金融研究的自主智能体
summary_zh: Dexter 是一个用于深度金融研究的自主智能体，它能够像人类研究员一样思考、规划和学习。该项目通过任务规划、自我反思和实时市场数据分析来执行复杂的金融研究任务，其设计理念类似于 Claude Code，但专门针对金融领域优化。，核心功能方面，Dexter 能够将复杂的金融问题分解为清晰、可执行的分步研究计划。它利用实时市场数据运行这些任务，检查自身工作，并不断优化结果，直至得出有数据支撑的可靠答案。其关键能力包括：智能任务规划（自动将复杂查询分解为结构化研究步骤）、自主执行（选择并调用合适的工具来收集金融数据）、自我验证（检查自身工作并迭代直至任务完成）、实时金融数据访问（获取损益表、资产负债表和现金流量表等）以及安全特性（内置循环检测和步骤限制，防止无限执行）。，技术实现上，项目运行需要 Bun 运行时（v1.0 或更高版本）以及 OpenAI API 密钥和 Financial Datasets API 密钥，可选 Exa API 密钥用于网络搜索。安装过程包括克隆代码库、使用 Bun 安装依赖项，并通过配置环境变量来设置必要的 API 密钥。，该项目在 GitHub 上开源，获得了较高的关注度。它代表了一种将大型语言模型（LLM）与专业领域工具链深度结合的应用方向，旨在自动化处理需要多步骤推理和实时数据验证的金融研究流程，为分析师和研究人员提供了强大的辅助工具。

title: agentscope-ai/agentscope - Build and run agents you can see, understand and trust.
content: GitHub - agentscope-ai/agentscope: Build and run agents you can see, understand and trust. · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert agentscope-ai / agentscope Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 2k Star 20.1k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 245 Commits 245 Commits .gemini .gemini .github .github assets/ images assets/ images docs docs examples examples src/ agentscope src/ agentscope tests tests .gitignore .gitignore .pre-commit-config.yaml .pre-commit-config.yaml CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING_zh.md CONTRIBUTING_zh.md LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md README_zh.md README_zh.md pyproject.toml pyproject.toml View all files Repository files navigation 中文主页 | Tutorial | Roadmap (Jan 2026 -) | FAQ What is AgentScope? AgentScope is a production-ready, easy-to-use agent framework with essential abstractions that work with rising model capability and built-in support for finetuning. We design for increasingly agentic LLMs. Our approach leverages the models' reasoning and tool use abilities rather than constraining them with strict prompts and opinionated orchestrations. Why use AgentScope? Simple : start building your agents in 5 minutes with built-in ReAct agent, tools, skills, human-in-the-loop steering, memory, planning, realtime voice, evaluation and model finetuning Extensible : large number of ecosystem integrations for tools, memory and observability; built-in support for MCP and A2A; message hub for flexible multi-agent orchestration and workflows Production-ready : deploy and serve your agents locally, as serverless in the cloud, or on your K8s cluster with built-in OTel support The AgentScope Ecosystem News [2026-02] FEAT : Realtime Voice Agent support. Example | Multi-Agent Realtime Example | Tutorial [2026-01] COMM : Biweekly Meetings launched to share ecosystem updates and development plans - join us! Details & Schedule [2026-01] FEAT : Database support & memory compression in memory module. Example | Tutorial [2025-12] INTG : A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol support. Example | Tutorial [2025-12] FEAT : TTS (Text-to-Speech) support. Example | Tutorial [2025-11] INTG : Anthropic Agent Skill support. Example | Tutorial [2025-11] RELS : Alias-Agent for diverse real-world tasks and Data-Juicer Agent for data processing open-sourced. Alias-Agent | Data-Juicer Agent [2025-11] INTG : Agentic RL via Trinity-RFT library. Example | Trinity-RFT [2025-11] INTG : ReMe for enhanced long-term memory. Example [2025-11] RELS : agentscope-samples repository launched and agentscope-runtime upgraded with Docker/K8s deployment and VNC-powered GUI sandboxes. Samples | Runtim
title_zh: agentscope-ai/agentscope - 构建并运行您看得见、能理解且可信赖的智能体。
summary_zh: AgentScope是一个面向生产环境、易于使用的智能体（Agent）框架，旨在构建可见、可理解且可信赖的智能体。它提供了必要的抽象层，以适应不断增强的模型能力，并内置了对模型微调的支持。该框架专为日益具备自主性的LLM设计，其核心理念是充分利用模型的推理和工具使用能力，而非通过严格的提示词或固化的编排流程来限制它们。，使用AgentScope的优势主要体现在三个方面：一是简单易用，内置了ReAct智能体、工具、技能、人在回路引导、记忆、规划、实时语音、评估和模型微调等功能，让用户能在5分钟内开始构建智能体；二是高度可扩展，拥有大量与工具、记忆和可观测性相关的生态系统集成，内置对MCP（模型上下文协议）和A2A（智能体间协议）的支持，并通过消息中枢实现灵活的多智能体编排与工作流；三是生产就绪，支持在本地、云端无服务器或K8s集群上部署和运行智能体，并内置了OpenTelemetry支持。，近期，AgentScope生态系统持续更新，引入了多项重要功能与集成。例如，新增了实时语音智能体支持、数据库支持及记忆压缩功能；集成了A2A协议、文本转语音（TTS）支持以及Anthropic的智能体技能；开源了适用于多样化现实任务的Alias-Agent和用于数据处理的Data-Juicer Agent；通过Trinity-RFT库集成了智能体强化学习，并引入了ReMe以增强长期记忆。此外，还发布了agentscope-samples代码库，并升级了agentscope-runtime，提供了Docker/K8s部署和基于VNC的GUI沙箱支持。
